message:
fix: dashboard creation in Studio now adds sidebar item and navigates (#5177)

The Create Dashboard flow in DashboardCustomizer called the API but
didn't add a sidebar item or navigate to the new dashboard. Now it
adds the sidebar item immediately, navigates, and persists to backend
in the background — matching the SidebarCustomizer behavior.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
